title: ditassa perijensis
intro: Ditassa perijensis is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane family. It is a woody vine native to the tropical regions of South America, particularly in Colombia. Ditassa perijensis has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function.
